name: mpy-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for MicroPython development workflows

plugins.name: mpy-pr-triage
plugins.description: List, sort, and triage open MicroPython PRs with branch and worktree status

plugins.name: mpy-ci
plugins.description: Run the MicroPython CI pipeline locally using Docker

plugins.name: mpy-rules
plugins.description: MicroPython project rules -- automatically loads build, style, PR, and architecture guidelines into .claude/rules/ for any MicroPython repo
